name: Clone Vat Experiments
desc: Primitive cloning vats repurposed from pre-collapse biotechnology. Produces a trickle of cloned humans to supplement natural population growth. An early step in mastering human cloning technology.

name: Cloning Industry
desc: Facilities to store raw resources needed to clone human beings from nothing. These humans have not lived a life, but had one simulated by an alpha-level AI. The humans produced this way are weaker, frail. They will most likely succumb to diseases or injuries way faster than normal human beings. They are, however, perfectly capable of reproducing sexually just as normal humans do. This leads to massively increased population growth

name: Cloning Megafactory
desc: An industrial-scale cloning operation capable of producing colonists by the thousands. The sheer volume of clone output transforms even a modest colony into a population powerhouse. The social cost is extreme — instability, violence, and disease run rampant among the clone-majority population.
